title: Hueron Sync Manifest
description: Tracks sync freshness between lib/hueron-app pages and src/pages/template/workon/ pages

hueronAppRepo.description: Relative path to the hueron-app repository root from aegis-lab root

entries.description: Map of template file path (relative to src/pages/template/workon/) to sync metadata

pagePath.description: Path to the primary source directory relative to frontend/apps/main/src/app/. May include Next.js route groups like (with-navi).

relatedGlobs.description: Glob patterns for related page-local files, relative to frontend/apps/main/src/app/

lastSyncedCommit.description: Full SHA of the hueron-app commit this template was last synced from

lastSyncedDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the sync was performed

templateRoute.description: Browser route for this template page (e.g. '/template/workon/procedure')

referenceScreenshot.description: Filename in .reference-screenshots/ directory, or null if not set
